resources.string: Cold start made the button stick — hands free mode activated 😅

Select background and text colour:

Black background with white text → classic high contrast.

Black background with yellow text → high contrast, helpful for dyslexia.

Blue background with white text → clearly visible.

Dark blue background with yellow text → enhanced readability.

Dark green background with white text → soft contrast, suitable for colour blindness.

Dark grey background with white text → reduced brightness, suitable for light sensitivity.
Library initialization error. The voice model files may have been deleted or corrupted by third-party applications (optimizers, memory cleaners, etc.). Please try reinstalling the application.
Error extracting library, please restart the app
Hold the mic button and speak.

Instructions:

1. Press and hold the mic button and speak. The app will process your speech in real-time. A temporary result will appear on the screen.
2. Once you\'ve finished speaking, wait for the temporary result to disappear, then release the mic button.
3. The final output will be displayed on the screen.

If you release the mic button before finishing your sentence, only the temporary result will be saved.



This application uses open-source and third-party libraries:

1. vosk-model-small-tr-0.3 Link
Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
Copyright © Alpha Cephei Inc.

The version of the library being used is shown in the app.
You may use your own VOSK model version by downloading the archive of your choice from, for example:
https://alphacephei.com/vosk/models
Mobile versions are generally labelled "small" and are about 50MB in size.
Extract it and place the resulting folder — ideally without duplicates — into the app directory:
/Android/data/com.safelogj.echolog/files/you_vosk_lib
If your custom library initialises successfully, its name will be shown in the app. Otherwise, the built-in version will be used.

2. Lottie Link
Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
Copyright © Airbnb, Inc.

3. Okio Link
Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
Copyright © Square, Inc.

4. Java Native Access (JNA) Link
Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
Copyright © Timothy Wall, Todd Fast, Liang Chen, et al.

5. Free Loading Animation Link
Licensed under the Lottie Simple License (FL 9.13.21).
Author: Eddy Koek

6. Free Rotate Phone Animation Link
Licensed under the Lottie Simple License (FL 9.13.21).
Author: Sandeep Maurya

Privacy Policy
